title: Timestamp Ordering Concurrency Control Protocol
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process for accepting or rejecting a read or write operation based on timestamp comparison rules.
elements: Data Item (X) with Read-Timestamp R-TS(X) and Write-TS(W-TS(X))
relationships: A Read Operation R(X) is accepted if TS(T) >= W-TS(X), otherwise it is rejected
A Write Operation W(X) is accepted if TS(T) >= R-TS(X) and TS(T) >= W-TS(X), otherwise it is rejected
